case_title: BROADCAST MUSIC, INC. VS. NU CONCEPTS MANAGEMENT GROUP INC.

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-01-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER BROADCAST MUSIC, INC. AS TO RESPONDENT NU CONCEPTS MANAGEMENT GROUP INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION, 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER BROADCAST MUSIC, INCORPORATED'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR. THE PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE AT THE HEARING A PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATIVE OF PROPER SERVICE OF ITS MOVING PAPERS. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER, CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 301/PJB
